calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica R. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff California Builder Aplliances, Inc., dba Standards of Excellence.
No appearance by defendant Patrick Spiers, Guarantor.
Default was entered against defendant on December 28, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant San Francisco Native Builders was filed on February 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 22, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff California Builder Appliance, Inc., dba Standards of Excellence, and against the Defaulted Defendant Patrick Spiers, Guarantor as follows:

Damages/Principal - $196,295.58.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,949.28.
Attorney's Fees - $39,000.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $260,709.86.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
